steps.t: Thama Aklam can be found to the south-east of Ost Anglebed. Steward Malthellim has asked you to defeat the Haradrim camped nearby before they grow bey…
Steward Malthellim can be found in the Lord's Hall in Ost Anglebed. You have defeated many Haradrim in Thama Aklam, but were unable to find any orders…
